docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CECIL, STEVE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-02-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TIM DBA UPRAISE PR FKA STERNS JOHNSON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CECIL, STEVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TIM DBA UPRAISE PR FKA STERNS JOHNSON $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $35.00, DEFENDANT STEVE CECIL PAID CLAIMED AMOUNT OF $500.00 BEFORE HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM; PLAINTIFF ENTITLED TO RECOVER COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2014 - JUDGMENT. THE PLAINTIFF STEVE CECIL APPEARS; NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT TIM JOHNSON. PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLE; NOT REPORTED (D-506).
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT RE: PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TIM DBA UPRAISE PR FKA STERNS JOHNSON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY CECIL, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TIM DBA UPRAISE PR FKA STERNS JOHNSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY CECIL, STEVE
